name: Daniel Sheehan
summary: Constitutional attorney and New Paradigm Institute leader involved in UAP disclosure advocacy and legal support for witnesses and whistleblowers.
profileSummary: Constitutional attorney and New Paradigm Institute leader involved in UAP disclosure advocacy and legal support for witnesses and whistleblowers.
inclusionNote: Included because his legal work and advocacy connect whistleblowers, disclosure legislation, public-interest law, and the broader UAP transparency movement.
